segments.original_text: どうなってるでしょうね

segments.text: This is absolutely incredible, isn't it?
segments.original_text: 本当に並々ならぬものがありますよね

segments.text: This is the kind of positioning you can only pull off with true character mastery!
segments.original_text: 本当に使い込んでいるからこそできるこの立ち回りです
チコを倒してこれは来たよ

full_text: What happens next? This is absolutely incredible, isn't it? This is the kind of positioning you can only pull off with true character mastery! And there's the opening! Brave Ness!
